notes: Deepened the Seraph primitive vocabulary so page fidelity can move through reusable props instead of page-only markup hacks.
Pushed both Seraph page compositions toward denser manuscript framing with margin notes, rail captions, gate eyebrows, and configurable footnotes.
Adjusted the primary button hover and active colors to keep readable foreground contrast, and improved diff tab states for dark surfaces.
reusableSurfacesTouched: shared Seraph manuscript ornament and margin-note CSS
shared Button primary state contrast styling
